Porter Novelli collects race data using the category “Indigenous American/First Nations,” which includes Native American, American Indian, Alaska Native, Pacific Islander, and Native Hawaiian, and is referred to in this report as “American Indian, Alaska Native, Pacific Islander, or Native Hawaiian.” Multiracial includes respondents that selected more than one race; another race includes those who did not select any race or ethnicity categories.
§ Survey was administered in English during April 24–30, 2023.
¶ Respondents were allowed to select more than one reason for the discrimination they experienced.
